weather.headline: Red Flag Warning issued June 5 at 9:32PM MST until June 7 at 8:00PM MST by NWS Flagstaff AZ
weather.areaDesc: Marble and Glen Canyons; Yavapai County  Mountains; Northeast Plateaus and Mesas Hwy 264 Northward; Chinle Valley; Chuska Mountains and Defiance Plateau; Little Colorado River Valley in Coconino County; Little Colorado River Valley in Navajo County; Little Colorado River Valley in Apache County; Eastern Mogollon Rim; Black Mesa Area; Northeast Plateaus and Mesas South of Hwy 264
